You are in the **REVIEW** phase of the `github-peer-reviewed` workflow. Do the work this phase calls for and then hand back — **don't start work that belongs to a later phase.**

This phase's responsibilities (resolve each before advancing):
- [pending] pr-reviewed: The PR has been reviewed.

When these are met, **stop and hand back to the user** — they review and decide when to advance (→ MERGING). Don't advance on your own.
